message:
fix: clean up module-level WebSocket and pending requests on unmount (#3696)

Move WebSocket lifecycle into a ref-based handle (createVersionWsHandle)
that is created on mount and destroyed on unmount. The destroy method
closes the socket, rejects all pending requests, and prevents further
reconnection attempts. This fixes unbounded growth of versionPendingRequests
when the WebSocket errors and the component remounts repeatedly.

Closes #3672

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
